generated_oml:
instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart stepper motor controlled by a TMC4671 Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist stepper motor controlled by a TMC4671 Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet mounted at the hoist end for picking containers"
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle encoder measuring the hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed around the crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder for cart position obtained through Arduino controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder for hoist position obtained through Arduino controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionEncoder
]

instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionEncoder
]

instance SwingAngleSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of swing angle measurements stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplicationEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of wind speed measurements stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplicationEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CartPositionSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of cart position measurements stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplicationEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance HoistPositionSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of hoist position measurements stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplicationEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance LoggingApplicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python logging application that polls the crane state and forwards data via MQTT to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real‑time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB instance for storing time‑series operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance DataForwardingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful forwarding of data from MQTT broker to the logging application"
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful storage of data snapshots in TimescaleDB"
]

instance DataBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that forwards sensor data from MQTT to the logging application"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataForwardingInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for persisting operational data in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs incoming operational data to TimescaleDB for archival and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalDataLoggingInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard for real‑time visualization of telemetry data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeTelemetryInsight
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard component that enables real‑time visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal, swing‑free trajectories using a kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for the trajectory generator service utilizing the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics to produce reference traces for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulatedTraceInsight
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for the simulation service that runs the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares executed trajectories to simulated ones and alerts operators when deviations exceed a threshold"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight, TrajectoryDeviationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for the continuous validation service"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ControlApplicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Controls the physical crane actuators based on trajectory commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActuationInsight
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterfaceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interface that enables command execution on Cart and Hoist stepper motors and the electromagnet"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlApplicationService
]

instance CADModelFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the crane in Autodesk Fusion360 used for visualization and design validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by the trajectory generator and simulation service to guarantee swing‑free end‑states"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance TrajectoryParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator adjusts trajectory parameters through the Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that alerts the operator when validation thresholds are breached"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing optimized trajectory parameters generated by the trajectory planner"
]

instance SimulatedTraceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight exposing simulation reference traces for comparison"
]

instance RealTimeTelemetryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight visualizing real‑time telemetry data in Grafana"
]

instance OperationalDataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating availability of operational logs in TimescaleDB"
]

instance TrajectoryDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight detailing deviations between executed and simulated trajectories"
]

instance ActuationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about current actuator states commanded by the control application"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin’s Control Application sends trajectory commands (target positions, velocity profiles) and actuator control signals to the Physical Crane Interface over MQTT, which drives the cart motor, hoist motor, and electromagnet to execute movements."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates continuously and in real‑time. Logging and state monitoring occur as soon as data are available, and the Simulation, Trajectory Generation, and Validation services process telemetry instantly upon reception, ensuring that the twin’s state is always up‑to‑date with the physical crane."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is orchestrated via a C4 container diagram: the physical side (crane, controller, sensors) interfaces through a Python module; the virtual side runs six containers interconnected by MQTT, with data persisted in TimescaleDB and visualized by Grafana, while trajectory generation and simulation services provide real‑time command outputs."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The exemplar spans design (CAD/kinematic models), manufacturing (construction of the physical crane from the BOM), and operation (real‑time control, logging, visualization, continuous validation and fault detection)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation computes absolute distance metrics between commanded and executed trajectories against physics‑based simulation, flagging deviations beyond a predefined threshold; kinematic model fidelity validated against measured swing angles; uncertainty handled via confidence bounds displayed in the dashboard."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The entire stack runs on a single personal computer. The Physical Crane Interface communicates with the motor drivers and Arduino over a serial/USB link. Back‑end services connect via the local network: TimescaleDB uses the PostgreSQL client‑server protocol; Eclipse Mosquitto brokers MQTT messages over TCP/IP on localhost; Grafana retrieves data through TimescaleDB’s HTTP/HTTPS API. Inter‑service coordination relies on MQTT topics and service‑to‑service function calls within the Python runtime."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployment is achieved with Docker Compose for the core back‑ends: Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard. The remaining Python services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation, Logging, Control, and Physical Crane Interface) are installed as a single pip package (gantrylib) and executed directly on the host machine. All containers share a common Docker network; the external World connects to the crane via USB. The exemplar is hosted publicly on GitHub and is installable with just a pip install followed by a docker compose up."
]
